meaning: n.小胡子,(哺乳动物的)触须
examples: His moustache prickled when he kissed me.
He has decided to grow a beard and a moustache.
The thick beard had gone, replaced by a bushy moustache.
With his ginger moustache, sun-destroyed hair and huge, rhinestone-studded watch, he's become a Hamptons icon.
The artists will adorn the finished work with a luxurious and splendid moustache to their work.
